overview.text: Aircraft registrations for NSW Ambulance, Police, Westpac, Surf Life Saving, RFDS and military assets operating in or near NSW. Use the Agencies search in the sidebar to jump to a specific registration.

sections.title: 🛩 Air Ambulance NSW – Fixed Wing
sections.intro: NSW Ambulance operates a fleet of fixed-wing aircraft for urgent patient transfers and long-distance retrievals.

sections.title: 🚁 NSW Ambulance / Toll HEMS
sections.intro: AW139 helicopters operated by Toll Helicopters on behalf of NSW Ambulance.

sections.title: 🚁 Westpac Rescue Helicopters
sections.intro: Operated by Westpac on behalf of agencies including NSW Ambulance and Tasmania Police.

sections.title: 🚔 Police Aviation
sections.intro: Police aviation assets from NSW and Victoria.

sections.title: 🚑 Interstate Ambulance
sections.intro: Ambulance assets from Victoria and South Australia.

sections.title: 🌙 Royal Flying Doctor Service
sections.intro: Fixed-wing aircraft used by RFDS sections across Australia.
